items.title: Amazon is oversold. Traders can take advantage of the weakness using this options trade
items.description: Amazon's recent weakness appears to reflect sentiment fatigue rather than a deterioration in business quality.

items.title: This software stock was hit hard on AI disruption fears. Now it’s proving detractors wrong
items.description: Analysts maintained their long-term bullishness on Cadence Design Systems, calling fears of AI disruption overblown.

items.title: Jefferies sees this online casino soaring more than 75%
items.description: The investment firm reiterated the online casino and sports betting company at a buy rating.

items.title: Mizuho upgrades Palantir, says AI demand makes recent sell-off ‘unjustifiable’
items.description: Mizuho sees shares of Palantir rallying 47% from here.

items.title: Buy this AI infrastructure stock that has doubled in the past year, says Compass Point
items.description: The firm initiated the artificial intelligence infrastructure stock with a buy rating.
